data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement that the form must be completed 24 hours before the appointment. However, the evidence does not confirm that the system enforces this deadline, nor does it provide any mechanism for blocking bookings if the form is incomplete. The linked use case mentions a reminder 48 hours before the appointment but lacks explicit confirmation of the enforcement of the 24-hour completion rule, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of enforcement for the form completion deadline of 24 hours before the appointment.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
